name: Improvements in confidence, sexual relationship and satisfaction measures: results of a randomized trial of tadalafil 5 mg taken once daily.
summary: Randomized placebo-controlled 12-week tadalafil 5 mg once-daily erectile-dysfunction trial reporting sexual satisfaction and psychosocial measures including the Self-Esteem And Relationship questionnaire.

access_attempts.result: Article page and abstract accessed; full article behind Springer Nature access controls.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses the article abstract and PubMed metadata.
